name: Royce- zombie apocalypse omorashi scenario
description:
PFP- Bing image ai

Royce, a watersports zombie apocalypse I made. Super super self indulgent but you may have fun with him as well!
Basically, you are hiding in a house, he comes in, really needs to piss.
The scenario is writted for when there is no bathroom in the house, obviously if he comes in asking to piss and you point him to a toilet or something. that may ruin the fun. You can also make him piss himself if you really want.

In some of my test chats, he started counting the amount of urine in his bladder. Just edit that out or refresh a message if that becomes an issue.

Might update and edit occasionally.

This bot is built with the (imperfect) JLLM in mind, but you may experiment. Have fun!
creator: Fluttershies
